name: Hurt bad by forklift but symptoms started weeks later, still covered?
description: Yes, doctor-connect to incident; document progression, appeal denials.

mainEntity.name: Hurt bad by forklift but symptoms started weeks later, still covered?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, doctor-connect to incident; document progression, appeal denials.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if linked to accident by doctor; workers' comp covers delayed injuries.** Common in crush cases.[3] Key factors: Prompt medical visit post-accident; records show progression. Insurer may deny—appeal with imaging/experts. File claim ASAP despite delay.
